# System Context — Open edX

_Generated 2026-06-24 16:04 UTC · c4gen dev_

## External systems & peers

| System | Role |
| --- | --- |
| **Keycloak (SSO)** | OAuth2/OIDC identity provider. The mitxonline-stack Open edX federates learner identity to Keycloak; Open edX in turn is an OAuth2 IdP to the apps. |
| **Mailgun** | Transactional and bulk course email delivery (ACE / django-anymail). |
| **MITx Online** | Enrollment/ecommerce platform paired with the mitxonline Open edX stack. Pushes user/enrollment/email-settings and reads grades; receives enrollment + certificate webhooks from Open edX. |
| **MITx Pro** | Professional-ed ecommerce platform. Authenticates learners via Open edX (OAuth2/social-auth), provisions edX users + tokens, enrolls, and pulls grades/course-run data. |
| **MicroMasters** | Program/credential platform. Uses Open edX as an OAuth2 IdP and batch-syncs enrollments, certificates, and current grades via edx-api-client. |
| **ODL Video Service** | Video platform. Registers transcoded video metadata (HLS/MP4 CloudFront URLs) into Open edX's edxval video API so videos play inside courses. |
